title: Mint Explainer| What would it take for India to create a SpaceX?
summary: SpaceX’s $2.5 trillion valuation is driven by its reusable rocket technology, which slashed launch costs and dominates the global space market. title: Internet now a lifeline, focus should shift from popularising access to protecting users: IT Secretary
summary: The government's digital policy is shifting from promoting access to actively protecting users and ensuring robust internet infrastructure, IT Secretary S Krishnan announced.
